decisions.decision: Direct JSON imports instead of Astro getCollection()
decisions.rationale: Dev server content collection caching caused stale data

decisions.decision: mix-blend-mode: multiply (planning) / screen (onsite) for hero title
decisions.rationale: User tested all blend modes via Leva panel, chose multiply for light mode, screen for dark

decisions.decision: Two-column section layout with sticky title
decisions.rationale: User requested titles fixed left while content scrolls right — magazine-style
Sticky clipped long content; stacking scroll deferred to Phase 3 GSAP
User found single button confusing; both labels always visible

decisions.decision: ExhibitionList replaces CinematicReveal+PinnedNarrative for exhibitions section
decisions.rationale: User designed 3-group list (collection, current, upcoming) with hover preview
User wanted all group titles/labels to match across site

decisions.decision: base: '/Kunsthaus' in astro.config for GitHub Pages

decisions.rationale: User provided .otf files, converted with woff2_compress
User requested thinnest outline icons for chevrons and UI
